findings.evidence: The definitions at lines 43-47 are just `Ideal.map` along `Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft/includeRight`; Mathlib states the matching `Ideal.map_includeLeft_eq` under `{R} [CommSemiring R] {A B} [Semiring A] [Semiring B] [Algebra R A] [Algebra R B]` in `Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/TensorProduct/RightExactness.lean:451-454`, while `HopfAlgebra` itself only starts at `[CommSemiring R] [Semiring A]` in `Mathlib/RingTheory/HopfAlgebra/Basic.lean:65`.
findings.fix: Split the file into sections: define the tensor-summand ideals under `[CommSemiring R] [Semiring H] [Algebra R H]`, then add the Hopf-ideal structure in the commutative Hopf-ring section needed by the roadmap.
findings.issue: `leftTensorIdeal`/`rightTensorIdeal` inherit `[CommRing R] [CommRing H] [HopfAlgebra R H]`, but these tensor-summand ideals only use the algebra/tensor-product ideal structure, not commutativity, additive inverses, or a Hopf structure.

summary: One exported API is stated under strictly stronger hypotheses than the construction uses.
